title: sesbania sesban
intro: Sesbania sesban, also known as the Ratanjot or Agati, is a perennial legume plant native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Sesbania sesban include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Sesbania sesban can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is also used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including digestive issues and joint pain.
